notes: Arturia MiniBrute V emulates the Arturia MiniBrute, the company's own flagship analog monosynth, featuring a unique single-oscillator architecture enriched by the Ultrasaw (multiple detuned sawtooth waves) and Metalizer (wavefolder/ring-mod-style waveshaping) circuits. The Steiner-Parker multimode filter provides simultaneous low-pass, band-pass, and high-pass outputs with a characteristically aggressive resonance. The signature Brute Factor control feeds the VCA output back into the filter input, adding harmonic saturation from subtle warmth to full clipping distortion. MiniBrute V is an excellent choice for punchy basses, aggressive leads, and experimental timbres where harmonic richness and analog drive are the goal.

Expression.description: Expression — scales output level for dynamics

Modulation.description: Modulation wheel — LFO depth or other assignable target

Portamento Time.description: Portamento time — glide speed between notes

Filter Cutoff.description: Steiner-Parker filter cutoff frequency — controls brightness across LP/BP/HP outputs

Filter Resonance.description: Filter resonance — characteristically aggressive; self-oscillates at high values

Brute Factor.description: Brute Factor — VCA-to-filter feedback saturation; from subtle grit to full harmonic clipping

Ultrasaw Amount.description: Ultrasaw amount — blends in detuned sawtooth copies for a chorus-like thickening without CPU overhead

Metalizer.description: Metalizer amount — waveshaping/ring modulation character; adds inharmonic overtones and metallic bite

Attack.description: Envelope attack time — shared amp/filter envelope attack

Release.description: Envelope release time — tail length after note off

LFO Rate.description: LFO rate — modulation speed for vibrato, tremolo, or filter movement

LFO Depth.description: LFO depth — modulation amount applied to pitch, filter, or PWM

Sub Osc Level.description: Sub-oscillator level — adds one or two octave sub to thicken the bass register

Reverb.description: Reverb send level — adds space and dimension
